summary: Tested all 7 security/correctness bug fixes for silver stock trading app. All 17 backend tests passed: P0 auth on upload endpoints (opening-stock, transactions, upload/init, master-stock), P0 auth on delete/reset endpoints (transactions/all, system/reset with admin role), P2 polythene delete role check, and notifications query fix.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ POST /api/opening-stock/upload now requires Depends(get_current_user) - returns 401 without auth
✓ POST /api/transactions/upload/{type} now requires Depends(get_current_user) - returns 401 without auth
✓ POST /api/upload/init now requires Depends(get_current_user) - returns 401 without auth
✓ POST /api/master-stock/upload now requires Depends(get_current_user) - returns 401 without auth
✓ DELETE /api/transactions/all requires auth + admin role - returns 403 for non-admin
✓ POST /api/system/reset requires auth + admin role + correct password - all checks verified
✓ DELETE /api/polythene/{id} requires admin role - returns 403 for non-admin users
✓ GET /api/notifications/my now matches both target_user and for_role schema
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security fixes verified: All upload/delete/reset endpoints now require authentication. Admin-only operations (system/reset, transactions/all delete, polythene delete) properly check role. Non-admin user SEE1 (executive) was used to verify role-based access controls. Notifications endpoint uses $or query to match both target_user and for_role fields.

test_classes: TestUploadEndpointAuth (5 tests) - All upload endpoints require auth
TestDeleteResetEndpointAuth (5 tests) - Delete/reset require auth + admin role
TestPolytheneDeleteAuth (3 tests) - Polythene delete requires admin role
TestAuthenticatedEndpointsWork (2 tests) - Endpoints work with valid auth
TestNotificationsQuery (1 test) - Notification query matches schema

notifications_query_fix.note: Query now uses $or to match target_user OR for_role
